title: Resume Analyzer
description: A web-based resume analyzer that evaluates resumes based on predefined criteria and provides structured feedback to improve resume quality and presentation.

title: Hedamo Product Disclosure
description: A structured and user-friendly product disclosure web application focused on clear presentation, accessibility, and clean UI/UX principles for better usability.

title: Job Portal
description: A responsive job portal web application allowing users to browse, search, and apply for job listings. Built with a focus on intuitive design and seamless user experience.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A fully responsive portfolio website to showcase projects and skills. Applied modern UI/UX principles and responsive design techniques for better usability across all devices.
